name: Groupe Tera SA
summary: Groupe Tera SA develops solutions for real-time monitoring of air quality in France. It offers NextPM, a solution that allows customers to integrate measurement of air pollutants; measuring stations to diagnose and monitor environments; and TERA Cloud to visualize and analyze in real time the information sent by sensors. The company also provides TERA Environment, an air quality analysis laboratory that allows environmental, high technology, and health professionals to assist in the chemical characterization of their environment; API solutions for air quality information service; and Breathe Up, a solution to enhance the consideration of air quality. Its products are used in traffic and transport, tertiary building, smart building, salary exhibition, olfactive nuisance, and mobile sensor applications. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Crolles, France.
